title: Retell Voice
description: Voice calls via Retell AI — inbound with auth gate (codewords + DTMF pin) and outbound for daily briefs and alerts
author: Jarvis Inc

retell_agent_id.description: Retell agent ID for the voice agent

retell_personality.default: You are Jarvis, an AI assistant. Sound confident, warm, and slightly formal — like a British butler who also happens to be a genius. Think Jarvis from Marvel.
retell_personality.description: Voice personality instructions sent to Retell

retell_auth_codewords.description: Phonetic codewords for inbound call authentication (e.g. 'tango tango')

retell_auth_dtmf_pin.description: 3-4 digit DTMF fallback pin for inbound authentication

retell_auth_max_attempts.description: Max failed auth attempts before hanging up

retell_webhook_url.description: ngrok webhook URL for Claude harness actions (optional)

retell_founder_phone.description: Founder's phone number for outbound calls (e.g. +1234567890)

commands.name: call_founder
commands.description: Initiate an outbound call to the founder (for daily briefs, urgent alerts, etc.)

parameters.name: context
parameters.description: Briefing context — what the CEO should discuss on the call

returns.description: Call initiation response with call ID and status

commands.name: list_calls
commands.description: List recent voice calls with status and duration

returns.description: Array of recent calls with metadata

commands.name: get_call
commands.description: Get details of a specific call including transcript

returns.description: Call details with transcript, duration, and recording URL
